title: Smoky Lemon French Chicken Salad
description: A fresh, protein-packed salad with smoked chicken, lemon zest, and a buttery goat cheese finish, perfect for a light yet satisfying lunch.

ingredients.name: lemon
ingredients.notes: use zest in rub, juice for dressing

ingredients.name: light vinaigrette
ingredients.notes: olive oil, lemon juice, Dijon mustard, salt, pepper

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium‑high heat.
In a small bowl mix olive oil, smoked paprika, salt, pepper, and lemon zest; rub onto chicken breasts.
Place chicken on the grill and cook 6‑7 minutes per side, or until internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C). Add a splash of lemon juice during the last minute of cooking for extra brightness.
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes, then slice into strips.
In a large bowl combine salad greens, radishes, red onion, toasted walnuts, and crumbled goat cheese.
Add the sliced chicken on top of the greens.
Drizzle the light vinaigrette over the salad and toss gently to coat all ingredients.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional lemon zest if desired.
